use_cases: Displaying article previews with thumbnail, title, description, and author metadata in blog layouts
Creating animated card grids for news feeds or content discovery pages
Building responsive article listings with hover scale effects and entry animations
Showcasing content cards with share functionality in media or publishing platforms
Designing scannable content summaries for SaaS product blogs or documentation sites
ai_summary: An animated, responsive article card component featuring framer-motion hover effects (scale and shadow) and scroll-triggered entry animations. Displays article image, title, description, author info with avatar, and publication date in a clean, minimal layout. Uses shadcn-style utility classes for consistent styling and supports share functionality. Optimized for content-heavy layouts like blogs, news feeds, and media platforms.
